name: Devon (United Kingdom)

colors.symbolism: the salt of the surrounding sea

description: A green field with a black cross fimbriated white extending to the edges (the Cross of Saint Petroc).
history: Designed by Ryan Sealey from the winning entry of a 2003 BBC Radio Devon competition; subsequently registered with the Flag Institute and now widely flown by Devon County Council.

features.symbolism: the cross of St Petroc, patron saint of Devon
